message:
test(fj-conformance): extend tensor dtype promotion oracle to i32 (frankenjax-13b6)

The dtype_promotion_tensor_level conformance test exercises JAX-oracle
parity for promotion across tensor element types. The covered set was
[bool, i64, u32, u64, f16, f32, f64, bf16] — i32 was conspicuously
missing despite tensor values carrying explicit DType::I32 internally
(scalar i32 still hot-promotes to I64, but tensor-level i32 is
distinct and reachable in real programs).

Add "i32" to tensor_dtypes so the oracle parity sweep also enumerates
i32-on-i32 and i32-with-other promotions, surfacing any implementation
mismatch revealed by the JAX fixtures.

Beads frankenjax-13b6 (Extend tensor dtype promotion oracle to i32)
flipped to in_progress; the beads entry documents the rationale
(tensor i32 is a distinct surface from scalar i32) and acceptance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
